subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the Beauteous, and that the Point of the Bayán is verily His servant and His Glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو العزیز الجمیل و ان نقطه البیان لعبده و بهائه لمن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @suffering and imprisonment
